description: SYNTHETIC TRAINING DATA — NOT REAL LABELED OBSERVATIONS. Labels are simulation ground-truth assigned by construction using setigen (Brzycki & Siemion 2022, ascl:2202.003), following the methodology of Ma et al. 2023 (Nature Astronomy). This dataset is training scaffolding only. It does not constitute detections, discoveries, or expert-labeled real telescope observations.
methodology: Follows Ma et al. 2023 (Nature Astronomy): synthetic signal injection into realistic noise with known ground-truth labels via setigen (Brzycki & Siemion 2022, ascl:2202.003). 600 examples across 4 classes (ETI-like/RFI/noise/known_object). This is NOT equivalent to expert-labeled real observations.
